The **men's 1500 metre freestyle** competition of the [swimming events](/wiki/Swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Swimming at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships was held on July 30 with the heats and the semifinals and July 31 with the final.

## Record

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_1500_metre_freestyle&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Record")]

Prior to the competition, the existing world and championship record were as follows.

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **World record**   **Championship record** | [Grant Hackett](/wiki/Grant_Hackett "Grant Hackett") | Australia | 14:34.56 | [Fukuoka](/wiki/Fukuoka "Fukuoka") | July 29, 2001 |
